name: h200_8gpu_dgx
_comment: NVIDIA HGX H200: 141 GB HBM3E @ 4.8 TB/s, FP16 dense 989 TFLOPS/GPU per framework convention (peak_flops_TF stores FP16 dense; FP8 = 1979 by linear byte scaling — same Hopper compute as H100, just bigger HBM), NVLink4 900 GB/s bidir (450 GB/s single-direction). 8-GPU NVLink domain via 4 NVSwitch chips. B_agg = 8 × 450 GB/s = 3.6 TB/s single-dir system aggregate. Cross-node would be InfiniBand.
